title: I Updated /grill-me And Solved Claude Code
summary: Chase AI released an update to the grill-me skill for Claude, introducing grill-me-codex to verify code outputs beyond planning. The skill extends verification functionality to validate that Claude Code outputs make sense and work correctly.
